import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let score = match string.parse_int(trimmed)
  when Some(n)
    n

  else if score >= 60

  else

  end
